subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath made tribulation as water for His exalted and furthermost Lote-Tree, and as a light for His servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی جعل البلاء ماء لسدرته العلیا و شجرته القصوی و نورا لعباده
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @martyrs and martyrdom, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
